---
title: "test_annex.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\contracts\test_annex.py"
loc: 35
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.92
style_score: 3.91
intel_score: 8.26
overall_score: 5.62
---

## Intent
The `test_annex.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_dominion, test_annex_scan, test_execution_placeholder. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_dominion, test_annex_scan, test_execution_placeholder. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.annex](file://src.core.annex)

### Exports
- `mock_dominion`
- `test_annex_scan`
- `test_execution_placeholder`
